Test Description: Positive edge interrupt enable for all pads with group interrupt validation and clear flow
Remarks: Uses external pad control at 0xA0243ffc; masks group during ISR; re-enables after clear
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Enable GIC IRQ based on GPIO0/GPIO1 macros (87/88); 2) Enable sysreg interrupt: write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIOx_INTR) per macro; 3) Configure all 32 pins for posedge only: for i=0..31 write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),0x00020000); 4) wait_on(10); 5) Put GPIOs 8-39 in input mode: write_reg GROUP1..4 IO_CTRL with 0x000000FF; 6) wait_on(10); 7) Enable group interrupt: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); 8) For i=0..31: drive low write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0x00000000); wait_on(10); set int_pend=1; drive high write_reg(0xA0243ffc,0xFFFFFFFF); poll with timeout=2000: while(int_pend==1 && --timeout>0) wait_on(10); if timeout==0: log error, test_err++, break; drive low again and wait_on(10); 9) finish(test_err). ISR Default_IRQHandler(): compute wr_val=(1<<i); set int_pend=0; read group status rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); mask group: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0x00000000); if (rdata_grp & 0xffffffff)!=0 then SUCCESS else log error and increment test_err; Clear per-pin raw: for j=0..31 write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4),0x00010000); wait_on(2); read group status again; if rdata_grp==0 then SUCCESS else log error and test_err++; Clear sysreg RAW_STCR1 GPIOx bit, verify cleared; Re-enable group: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); Clear GIC IRQ 87/88.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - Each iteration must cause ISR to run and clear int_pend before timeout; - Group status must become non-zero on edge, then 0 after per-pin raw clear; - Sysreg RAW_STCR1 GPIOx bit must be cleared and verified; - No unexpected errors printed.
Gap Analysis: - No per-pin functional verification beyond group status for all pins simultaneously; - Assumes external pad control via 0xA0243ffc; - No noise/debounce testing; - Limited error handling
